title: haplophyllum linifolium
intro: Haplophyllum linifolium, also known as the Narrow-leaved Dodonaea or Narrow-leaved Barberry, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Haplophyllum linifolium include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
